About Expertise Portfolio Resume Contact

Nicole Annen

Full Stack Marketing Pro

View Resume Connect on LI

Hi! I'm Nicole, nice to market with you.

I am a results-driven marketing professional with over 10 years of experience in B2B SaaS, excelling in cross-functional project management and demand generation. Throughout my career, I've worked with companies like Blue Margin, Digital Risk Group/Spadafy, Key Bridge Advisors, and Value Technology Foundation.

My expertise spans content creation, SEO, social media, email automation, and budget tracking. I'm proficient with various project management tools and passionate about tech-driven solutions like blockchain.

With a background in psychology from the University of Colorado, I apply psychological insights to craft marketing strategies that resonate with target audiences.

Core Marketing Skills

My diverse skill set allows me to develop and execute comprehensive marketing strategies that drive results.

Event Marketing & Sales Enablement

Designing and executing targeted sales enablement events including lunch & learns, cocktail events, and ICP-focused networking experiences that drive qualified leads and strengthen client relationships.

Digital Marketing Strategy

Developing comprehensive marketing strategies that align with business objectives and drive measurable results across all digital channels.

LinkedIn & YouTube Advertising

Creating and managing targeted advertising campaigns on LinkedIn and YouTube to reach B2B audiences, drive engagement, and generate qualified leads through strategic content and precise targeting.

AI Marketing Automation

Leveraging AI tools like OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI, and Gemini to automate and enhance marketing efforts, improving efficiency and personalization.

SEO & Analytics

Optimizing content for search engines and analyzing data to drive strategic marketing decisions and improve ROI.

Content Development

Creating compelling content using tools like Canva, Adobe Suite, Davinci, and CapCut to engage audiences and drive conversions.

                    Event Marketing & Sales Enablement

                    Sales Enablement Events Expertise

                    I specialize in creating targeted sales enablement events that connect with your ideal customer profile (ICP) and drive meaningful business relationships:

                    • Lunch & Learn Sessions: Educational events that position your company as a thought leader while building relationships with prospects
                    • Cocktail Events & Networking: Sophisticated networking experiences designed to foster connections with key decision-makers
                    • ICP-Focused Experiences: Tailored events that speak directly to your ideal customer's pain points and interests
                    • Executive Roundtables: Intimate discussions that create high-value touchpoints with C-level prospects
                    • Industry Workshops: Hands-on sessions that demonstrate your expertise while generating qualified leads

                    Event Design & Booth Materials

                    One Pagers

                    Nicole edits, produces, and manages distribution and marketing for the Dashboard Effect Podcast, part of Blue Margin

                    Professional Experience

                    My career journey and qualifications in marketing and content creation.

                    Freelance Marketing Consultant

                    PitchAxis

                    Remote

                    2024 – Present

                    • Providing strategic marketing consulting and execution for B2B SaaS companies and startups.
                    • Specializing in content creation, digital marketing campaigns, and brand development.
                    • Delivering comprehensive marketing solutions from strategy to implementation.
                    Work with me at PitchAxis →

                    Marketing and Event Manager

                    Blue Margin, Inc

                    Hybrid - Fort Collins, CO

                    December 2023 – Present

                    • Provided strategy and execution of all marketing, product branding, and social media campaigns, resulting in first profitable year (2024).
                    • Managed and produced/edited 'The Dashboard Effort' podcast, driving a 130% ROI on ad spend and 1400% YouTube subscriber growth in 9 months via analytics-driven reallocation.
                    • Liaised between sales and product teams, delivering on-demand content, optimized landing pages, and AI-driven email campaigns.

                    Marketing Specialist (Contract)

                    Digital Risk Group / Spadafy

                    Remote - Seattle, WA

                    June 2023 – November 2023

                    • Developed campaigns for VDI Managed Services, securing #1 SEO rankings for key search terms.
                    • Designed conference collateral & booth materials for VMWare Explore, enhancing brand visibility.
                    • Produced video advertising content, driving engagement and lead generation.

                    Associate Consultant (Contract)

                    Key Bridge Advisors

                    Remote - Washington, D.C.

                    October 2022 – October 2023

                    • Provided digital marketing services for blockchain technology clients, designing newsletters and managing email campaigns to boost engagement.
                    • Collaborated with internal teams and clients to develop marketing strategies aligned with tech-driven objectives.

                    Education

                    Bachelor of Arts - Psychology

                    University of Colorado | Boulder, CO

                    August 2018 – May 2021

                    Associate of Arts and Sciences

                    Johnson County Community College | Overland Park, KS

                    2007 – 2010

                    Certifications

                    • Become an AI-Powered Marketer – SEMrush (Jul 2024)
                    • Mastering YouTube Search Trends and SEO Strategies – SEMrush (Apr 2024)
                    • HubSpot CMS for Marketers – HubSpot (Feb 2024)
                    • Digital Marketing and E-Commerce – Google (Mar 2023)
